name: Tushar
bio: B.Tech CSE student at Dronacharya College of Engineering with a focus on predictive modeling and automation. Passionate about leveraging data science to solve complex resource allocation problems, particularly in healthcare.
objective: To leverage data science to solve complex resource allocation problems, particularly in healthcare, while actively participating in the startup incubation ecosystem to bring tech-driven ideas to life.
aboutHtml:
Tushar is an AI & Machine Learning developer currently pursuing a B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering at Dronacharya College of Engineering (2025–2029).

He specializes in predictive analytics, feature engineering, and automation scripting. His flagship project, CareMatrix, uses Random Forest to forecast hospital patient inflow with a 72-hour lead time. Tushar was selected for the ACIC SGTU Incubation Program and placed 3rd at the CodeSphere 36-Hour Hackathon at SGT University.

projects.title: CareMatrix — AI-Powered Resource Forecasting
projects.description: Developed a predictive engine using Random Forest to forecast hospital patient inflow with a 72-hour lead time. Engineered features by correlating environmental variables like AQI and weather patterns with historical admission data. Implemented automated load visualization heatmaps to streamline medical staff distribution.

resume.heading: AI & Machine Learning Developer — B.Tech CSE Student

sections.title: Summary
sections.content: Computer Science student at Dronacharya College of Engineering with a focus on predictive modeling and automation. Passionate about leveraging data science to solve complex resource allocation problems, particularly in healthcare, while actively participating in the startup incubation ecosystem.

sections.title: Key Achievements
sections.content:
• 3rd Position at CodeSphere 36-Hour Hackathon, SGT University
• Selected for ACIC SGTU Incubation Program to scale CareMatrix for market readiness
• Selected delegate at National Science Day 2026 at Vigyan Bhawan for discussions on 'Women in Science: Catalyzing Viksit Bharat'
• Built CareMatrix — AI-powered hospital resource forecasting with 72-hour lead time
• Correlated AQI and weather data with hospital admission records for improved prediction accuracy
